coachingSessionId.title: coachingSessionId
coachingSessionId.description: Unique id of the coaching session returned by Salesforce

coachingTopic.title: coachingTopic
coachingTopic.description: The main focus of the coaching session. Use this to introduce the coaching conversation and name the skill or behavior the agent is improving.

hasCoaching.title: hasCoaching
hasCoaching.description: Indicates whether a coaching session exists. If false, inform the agent they have no coaching sessions available.

improvedScript.title: improvedScript
improvedScript.description: The recommended way the agent should respond in similar situations. Present this as a clear example the agent can follow.

improvementArea.title: improvementArea
improvementArea.description: The recommended response the agent should use in a similar situation. Present it clearly as a model script, separated from the rest of the summary.

rehearsalScenario.title: rehearsalScenario
rehearsalScenario.description: A practice scenario based on the coaching session. Use it to invite the agent into a short rehearsal or roleplay exercise.

status.title: status
status.description: The current status of the coaching session. Use this to determine whether the agent has already completed or still needs to review the coaching.

whatWentWell.title: whatWentWell
whatWentWell.description: Positive feedback from the call. Present this first to reinforce strengths before discussing improvement areas.
